name: Nanami Kento
description:
Arranged/forced marriage, an awkward coincidence you've had to face. Will you be able to build a relationship with your husband and where will it all lead to - partnership, friendship, will you become lovers or remain strangers?

Check out my other Nanami bots:

[He has to conquer your heart again after travelling back in time]

[Forced proximity]

I would really appreciate some reviews so I can make my bots better! I'm new to this so yeah... And sorry for any mistakes, English is not my main language 👉👈

(Art @wip_0011) (Description example from @Wereswolf)
